zh.lifeSummary: 當Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire於1485年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾特爾福德時，她的父親Thomas Cheshire35歲，母親Katherine Boulton30歲。她於大約1510年與Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她於1514年住在英國貝德福爾也爾登且於1519年住在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。她去世於1566年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire于1485年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾特爾福德时，她的父亲Thomas Cheshire35岁，母亲Katherine Boulton30岁。她于大约1510年与Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她于1514年住在英国貝德福爾也爾登且于1519年住在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。她去世于1566年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheshire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name for someone from the county of Cheshire in northwestern England, the name of which is early recorded as Cestrescire, from the name of the county seat, Chester , + Old English scīr ‘district, division’.

variants.name: Chester
meanings: English: habitational name from Chester, the county seat of Cheshire, or from any of various smaller places called with this word (as for example Little Chester in Derbyshire, Chester le Street in County Durham, or Chesters in Northumberland), which is from Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort or walled city’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’).

variants.name: Chesser
meanings: English (Middlesex) and Scottish (Aberdeenshire, Midlothian): variant of   Cheshire  .

variants.name: Cheshier
meanings: English: variant of   Cheshire  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chessher
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey): variant of   Cheshire  .

nameMeanings.name: Emlyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, possibly from Latin Aemilianus (a derivative of the old Roman family name Aemilius, which is probably from aemulus ‘rival’). Alternatively, it may have a Celtic origin; there are Breton and Irish saints recorded as Aemilianus, which may be a Latinized form of a lost Celtic name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire was born in 1485, in Telford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Cheshire, was 35 and her mother, Katherine Boulton, was 30. She married Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough about 1510, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She lived in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England in 1514 and Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England in 1519. She died in 1566, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire est née en 1485, à Telford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cheshire, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine Boulton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough environ 1510, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle a vécu à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre en 1514 et à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre en 1519. Elle est décédée en 1566, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire 1485 in Telford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Cheshire 35 und ihre Mutter Katherine Boulton 30. Sie hat um 1510 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1514 hat sie in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England und 1519 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England gelebt. Sie starb 1566 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire è nata il nel 1485 nel Telford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Cheshire, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Katherine Boulton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough circa 1510, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Vissuto a Yelden, Bedfordshire, England nel 1514 e nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England nel 1519. Morì nel 1566, nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshireが1485年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアテルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Cheshireは35歳，母Katherine Boultonは30歳であった。約1510年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでThomas Neale Esquire of Ellesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1514年にはイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンに，1519年にはイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウに住んでいた。彼女は1566年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 텔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cheshire(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Boulton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1514년도에 영국 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서, 1519년도에 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 살았다. 그녀는 1566년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire nasceu em 1485, em Telford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cheshire, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Boulton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough aproximadamente 1510, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela viveu em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra em 1514 e em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra em 1519. Ela faleceu em 1566, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire родилась в 1485 г. в местности телфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Cheshire было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Boulton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough около 1510 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она жила в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия в 1514 году и в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия в 1519 году. Она умерла в 1566 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire nació en 1485, en Telford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Cheshire, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Katherine Boulton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough aproximadamente 1510, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra en 1514 y en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra en 1519. Murió en 1566, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
